Template for filing a Request for Comments (RFC) with sections for problem, proposed change, and additional context.

# Purpose
The file defines a template for submitting a Request for Comments (RFC) within a project. It includes a `name` and `description` to identify the purpose of the RFC. The `labels` section assigns the "RFC" label to submissions for categorization. The `body` section contains structured input fields for users to complete. It starts with a checkbox to confirm if the user has searched for existing issues related to the RFC, which is mandatory. It then provides text areas for users to describe the problem they aim to solve and the proposed change, both of which are required fields. An additional text area allows users to provide any extra information, such as links or references, to offer more context.
